org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency

    Description
    DependencyGraph
    Represents a graph of dependencies between contracts/proofs, i.e.
  • Classes in org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency used by org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency
    Class
    Description
    DependencyGraph
    Represents a graph of dependencies between contracts/proofs, i.e.
    DependencyGraph.EdgeType
    indicates the type of a contract application (if termination has to be considered or not)
    DependencyGraph.SCC
    Represents a strongly connected component of the graph.
    DependencyNode
    Represents a node in the graph of dependencies between proofs/contracts.
    NodeIntermediateWalker
    Walks an intermediate proof representation tree as created when loading a *.proof file.
